name: WonderPush
description: WonderPush — mobile and web push notifications with predictable flat-rate pricing for unlimited notifications.

seo.title: WonderPush — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: WonderPush: WonderPush — mobile and web push notifications with predictable flat-rate pricing for unlimited notifications.

when_to_use: Flat-rate unlimited push notifications for mobile and web
Push segmentation and automation without per-notification fees
Re-engagement campaigns for mobile apps at predictable cost

pros: Mobile and web push under one SDK
cons: Feature depth trails Braze or OneSignal
Analytics lack cohort and funnel depth
review.verdict: Predictable pricing makes it attractive for high-volume senders; evaluate features before committing.
review.best_for: Apps sending millions of pushes who hate per-message pricing
review.not_for: Teams needing rich journeys, CDP, or advanced analytics
